title: ECB Forum on Central Banking
summary: This is a navigation/landing page for the ECB Sintra Forum, an annual central banking conference. The page contains only event logistics: the 2026 forum dates (June 29 – July 1, 2026), the theme 'Shaping Europe's future: innovation, growth and stability', and information about the Young Economist Prize (€10,000). No substantive policy content, research findings, or macro analysis is present.
key_points: The 2026 ECB Forum is scheduled for June 29 to July 1, 2026 in Sintra, Portugal.
The announced theme is 'Shaping Europe's future: innovation, growth and stability'.
The Young Economist Prize offers €10,000; applications closed March 2, 2026.
No policy statements, research papers, or substantive commentary are included on this page.
This is an event announcement and navigation page, not archiveable research content.
why_it_matters: This source provides no substantive content for market structure or macro catalyst analysis. It is a static landing page containing only event logistics for an upcoming conference. No policy signals, data releases, or research findings are present.
notes: This source is a navigation/listing page for the ECB Sintra Forum. It contains no substantive research, policy analysis, or macro catalyst content.
